certificates.title: WordPress
certificates.description: I have hands-on experience with WordPress, including website creation, theme customization, plugin integration, and content management. I have worked on building and managing websites using both the classic editor and modern page builders like Elementor. My skills in WordPress allow me to create responsive, user-friendly websites tailored to various needs and audiences.

certificates.title: Microsoft Office Specialist
certificates.description: I have successfully passed the Microsoft Office Specialist (MOS) certification test. I am skilled in using Microsoft Office applications such as Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, enabling me to work efficiently in a professional environment.

certificates.title: Web Design & Development
certificates.description: With 1-2 years of experience in web design, I create responsive, user-friendly websites that effectively represent brands online. My skills include HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, and WordPress development, along with platforms like Shopify and Wix for e-commerce solutions.

certificates.title: Digital Marketing Certificate
certificates.description: With 1 year of hands-on experience in digital marketing, I specialize in creating targeted campaigns that drive results. My expertise includes social media marketing, content strategy, and audience engagement across platforms like Facebook and Instagram.

settings.name: Muhammad Bilal Rasheed
settings.title: Full Stack Developer
settings.subtitle: Building modern web applications with passion and precision.
settings.aboutText: I am a Website Developer / Full Stack dedicated to crafting digital solutions that balance technical complexity with human-centric design. My journey is defined by a relentless pursuit of excellence and a deep-seated passion for problem-solving.
